description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian wearing a stylized animal mask with elongated ears and long, flowing hair. The individual is dressed in a casual, urban outfit consisting of a fitted sweatshirt and jogger-style pants adorned with graphic designs and contrasting panels. The pants feature detailed artwork, including a prominent face motif and blue accent sections, adding a unique flair to the attire. The person is also wearing modern sneakers, suitable for streetwear fashion. The overall appearance is striking and contemporary, blending elements of street style with fantasy or cosplay influences. The figure's posture is relaxed, with arms slightly bent and legs apart, suggesting readiness for movement.
description: A masked adult in urban streetwear with graphic joggers, long hair, and sneakers, blending street style with fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the animal mask, long hair, graphic joggers, and sneakers clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mask's profile, hair length, and the blue and white artwork on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the hair, back of the sweatshirt, and detailed pant graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the mask's ear, hair flow, and the continuation of the pant's graphic design.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sweatshirt and graphic jogger pants with a stylized animal mask
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent and legs apart
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with layered length
